title: urachne racemosa
intro: Urachne racemosa, also known as the prickly hair grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Urachne racemosa are derived from its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Urachne racemosa include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Urachne racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption or topical application.
